name: list_rows
description: Fetch rows from a specific table in a Coda document. Supports filtering with Coda formulas, sorting by columns, selecting specific columns to return, and pagination for large result sets. Returns row IDs, cell values, and metadata.

parameters.name: docId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the Coda document containing the table.

parameters.name: tableId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the table to list rows from.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rows to return per page (1-100). Defaults to 25.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination to fetch the next page of rows.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: A Coda formula to filter rows. Only rows where the formula evaluates to true are returned.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Column name or ID to sort by, optionally prefixed with '+' (ascending) or '-' (descending).

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: List of column IDs or names to include in the response. If omitted, all columns are returned.

parameters.name: useColumnNames
parameters.description: If true, column identifiers in the response use display names instead of IDs.
